title: Under Bed Storage Box with Lid 2 Pack, Low Profile Foldable Underbed Clothes Organiser Under Sofa and Cot, W/ Ultra Thick Fabric and Sturdy Bottom/Sides, Storage Box for Dorm and Home 76x40x17cm
features: Spacious Design with Ample Capacity: Measuring 76cm x 40cm x 17cm, our Space series under bed storage boxes with lid provide ample space for clothes, bedding, shoes, and blankets. Their large 50L capacity keeps your room clutter-free, while the low-profile he low profile under bed storage boxes ensure they fit effortlessly under beds and sofas, making them a versatile solution for closet organizers and storage.

Waterproof, Soft, and Long-lasting Fabric: Crafted from premium ultra-thick linen fabric that is waterproof, our underbed storage boxes protect your belongings from moisture, dust, and damage. The soft yet durable material ensures long-lasting use, making the under bed organiser a perfect choice for safeguarding your seasonal items or everyday essentials while keeping them clean.

Reinforced Construction: Unlike cheaper products that are flimsy and without support, this storage box under bed is built to last. Featuring reinforced sides and a solid bottom, it can maintain its shape and securely hold your belongings. Whether you’re storing heavier items like blankets or lighter clothing, the reliable protection and support ensures that your items are well-organised and safe.

Premium Foldable Design: Our under bed storage bag is both foldable and free-standing with the PP boards inside, making it easy to set up or collapse for convenient storage when not in use. The narrow under bed clothes storage boxes can be hidden to fully utilize space. With collapsible design, the storage bags can maximize space while providing a clean, organised look to your bedroom or dorm room.

Perfect for Dorm Rooms and Modern Homes: This under the bed storage box fits seamlessly with dorm beds and closets. Its compact size and sturdy design makes it a college essentials storage tool for students starting or going back to school. Thoughtfully designed with three reinforced handles and double smooth zippers, this storage box is easy to pull out and carry, perfect for year-by-year moving in school dorms.
